---
title: "06.1 - MethylKit: DMLs
---

# Load libraries & data

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(methylKit)
library(pheatmap)
library(rcolorbrewer)
library(tidyverse)

#object
load("output/methylkit/objects/methylkit_filtered.RData")

```

# Unite & create PCA
```{r}

meth <- unite(myobj_filtered, destrand=TRUE)

# PCA
PCASamples(meth)

# Clustering
clusterSamples(meth)

# Differential methylation
diff <- calculateDiffMeth(meth)

# Significant loci
dml <- getMethylDiff(diff, difference=25, qvalue=0.01)

# Save
write.csv(dml, "output/methylkit/dml/dml_25pct_q001.csv")

# Export BED
bed <- data.frame(
  chr = dml$chr,
  start = dml$start,
  end = dml$end
)

write.table(bed,
  "output/methylkit/dml/dml_25pct_q001.bed",
  sep="\t", quote=FALSE, row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)

```
